title: Add non-linux build stubs for pkg/domain and pkg/specgen
body:
This allows these packages to at least build, but not necessarily function correctly on non-linux platforms. The pkg/specgen commit introduces a local type ```rlimT``` which is used to convert runtime-spec POSIXRlimit to platform-specific Rlimit structures - on FreeBSD rlimit members are signed integers.

```release-note
None
```
